end,function(X,j)local L=Y(j)local r=function(...)return B(X,{...},j,L)end return r end,function(X,j)local L=Y(j)local r=function(r)return B(X,{r},j,L)end return r end,function(X,j)local L=Y(j)local r=function(r,k,P,s)return B(X,{r,k,P,s},j,L)end return r end,function(X)local j,B=565869-565868,X[77375+-77374]while B do F[B],j=F[B]-(-276618+276619),(690101-690100)+j if-337641-(-337641)==F[B]then F[B],w[B]=nil,nil end B=X[j]end end,function(X,j)local L=Y(j)local r=function()return B(X,{},j,L)end return r end,function(X,j)local L=Y(j)local r=function(r,k,P,s,z)return B(X,{r,k;P;s;z},j,L)end return r end return(t(994077+7600621,{}))(L(z))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[j(-906074-(-880736))],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
